# Hostal Nómada

> Boutique hostel in a 1948 Art Deco building in the historic center of Santiago de los Caballeros, Dominican Republic. Owned and operated by a young couple with 14 years of hosting experience.

## About

Hostal Nómada is located at C/ Benito Monción 29, esq. Máximo Gómez 34, Centro Histórico, Santiago de los Caballeros, Dominican Republic. The building was designed in 1948 by architect Pablo N. Pérez Rancier for Dr. José de Jesús Jiménez Almonte — cardiologist, botanist, and Dominican national chess champion. The endemic Dominican orchid Tolumnia jimenezii carries his name. The building operated as a medical consultorio and private residence before being abandoned for over 20 years, then restored by its current owners. It is listed in the Guía de Arquitectura de Santiago, page 105.

## Accommodations

- Cuarto Valle: private room, double bed, private bathroom, AC, WiFi, smart lock. 4.64★ on Airbnb. From DOP 2,400/night (~USD 41).
- Cuarto Jungle: private room, tropical atmosphere, natural light, private bathroom, AC, WiFi. 4.5★. From DOP 2,400/night.
- Cuarto Mountain: private room with city-view balcony, private bathroom, AC, WiFi. 5.0★ Guest Favorite. From DOP 2,400/night.
- Habitación Compartida: bunk beds, shared bathroom, personal lockers, common areas, AC, WiFi. From DOP 900/person/night (~USD 15).

## On-site Business

Cervecería Búcaro is an artisan brewery that operates in the same building as Hostal Nómada. Open to hostel guests and external visitors. Unique in Santiago's historic center.

## Ratings

- Airbnb: 4.64 stars
- Hostelworld: 4.69 stars (Superb)
- Combined reviews: 457

## Amenities

WiFi, air conditioning, smart lock (self check-in), free parking, hot showers, linens and towels, pets welcome (2 dogs on-site), common areas, on-site craft brewery.

## Contact & Location

- Address: C/ Benito Monción 29, esq. Máximo Gómez 34, Centro Histórico, Santiago de los Caballeros, Dominican Republic
- WhatsApp: +1 829-755-7202
- Web: https://hostalnomadard.com
- Booking: https://hostalnomadard.com/reservar
- Check-in: 3:00pm–11:00pm | Check-out: by 11:00am
- Response time: under 1 hour. Bilingual (Spanish/English).
- 25 minutes from Cibao International Airport (STI).
- Walking distance to Plaza Duarte, Calle del Sol, and the Monumento.
